name: bountyhound-marketplace
description: Bounty Hound Bug Bounty Hunting Tools

plugins.name: bountyhound-agent
plugins.description: Smart bug bounty hunting with 155 agents across 11 profiles. v6.1: chain canvas (attack chain tracking across sessions), /feedback command (HackerOne outcome loop), session state file (drift prevention), canvas-aware hypothesis scoring, CVSS justification, chain report format, patterns.md quality gate.
